parsed.summary: This commit adds an interactive menu to the /glm:setup command when already configured, renames the npm scope, and updates release documentation. The changes are confined to markdown command files, JSON config, and documentation. No executable code, state mutations, auth boundaries, or data-handling logic are touched. The setup.md command template is a prompt definition, not runtime code — the 'menu' is just reordered prompt text. No material ship-blocking risk identified.
